title: LEARFIELD AND ELECTRONIC ARTS TO DEBUT EA SPORTS FIFA 22 WITHIN LEVELNEXT COLLEGE ESPORTS PORTFOLIO
text: Registration Now Open to College Students Nationwide for First-Ever LevelNext EA SPORTS FIFA 22 College National Championship; Competition Begins April 23 for $100,000 Prize Pool PLANO, Texas and REDWOOD CITY, Calif., March 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- LEARFIELD, a leading media and technology services company in intercollegiate athletics, and Electronic Arts (NASDAQ: EA), a worldwide leader in interactive entertainment, announced the debut of EA SPORTS™ FIFA 22 within the award-winning LevelNext collegiate esports league.
